title: cyclamen hederifolium subsp. balearicum
intro: Cyclamen hederifolium subsp. balearicum is a lesser-known subspecies of cyclamen, a flowering plant native to the Balearic Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, promoting digestive health, and supporting immune function. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using cyclamen hederifolium subsp. balearicum for medicinal purposes.
